titleStmt.title: SII 38.503: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 503. (A.R. No. 503 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the same wall, first prākāra, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Kulōttuṅga III Year 16, Maka; śu. di. 7 Friday, Rēvati = 1st January 1194 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. This epigraph records the sale of dry and wet lands, excempted from taxes, by the authorities (Ādichaṇḍēśvara) of Togumāmaṇi Nāyaṉār temple at Ūṟṟattūr in Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, to a dancing-girl (dēvaraḍiyāḷ) Umaiāḻviyāḷ Kāravallanaṅgai of the above temple, who consecrated the image of the god, Umai-Iśvaram uḍaiya nāyanār at Tiruneḍuṅgūr, a dēvadāna of the temple. It appears the land was sold to meet the expenses for the construction of tirumaḍaiviḷāgam, (residential quarters around the temple), flower garden and other expenditure connected with the offerings and worship of the temple. Among the boundaries of the land sold reference is made to a Piḍāri temple. The temple authorities having sold the land received the amount [kaḻañju] and probably deposited the same for the abhishēka ceremony. Rest of the details is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyumkoṇṭaruḷiya śrīkolottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6 vatu
makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa revati nāḷ vaṭakarai Irājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūr
nāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūruṭaiyār tokumāmaṇināyanār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara teva(r)raruḷāl Ikkoyil tevarraṭiyāḷ tiru
yāḷ Umaiyāḻviyāṉa kāravallavanaṅkaikku nilapparivattaṉaip piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉnāyanār tevatānam tiruneṭuṅ
kūril Ivaḷ Eḻuntaruḷivikkiṟa Umaiīśvaram Uṭaiyanāyanā(ṟ)kku tirukkoyilum tirumaṭaiviḷākammum tirunanatavanamum tiruppaṭimāṟṟu
tta nimantaṅka(ḷ)ḷukku Uṭa(l)lāka nañcai puñcaiyum nattamum Iṟaiyi(l)lik kāṇiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattu Ellaiyāvatu nattattu
kiḻpāṟkellai karuppuṭaiyāṉ toṭṭattu vitaikku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Ivaḷ kallina kuḷattu tenkaraikku
vaṉ brammarāyan Akattu matiḷcuvaṟku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai nelkkuḷattinṟum periyakuḷat teṟpokiṟa vaḻikku teṟkum Āka
llaikku Uḷpaṭṭa 1 veli Inṉilam Oru veliyum naṉcey ṉilattukku Ellai Āvatu kiḻpāṟkellai Iva po
n pāṟkellai piṭārikoyilukku vaṭakkil ṉocci vākkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai naṭuvil keṇiyoṭu poki
pāṟkellai periyāḻvip peraiyaṉ kuḷattu nancey nilattukku teṟkum Ipperu nāṉku E
Iraṇṭān tākku kīḻpāṟkellai neṟkuḷattu kuḷattukkup pokiṟa Oṭaikku meṟkum teṉpa
kku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai periyayeri karaikkum toṭṭattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vaṭamaruṅ
kuḷ paṭṭa nilam 5savum Āka nilam veli Innilam Iruveliyum puñcai nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟkellai
lemela ta � teṟku nokkip poy cittirakūṭa muttaraiyan ceyyilkīḻ vitaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai
teṉ vitaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kallakamuṭaiyān kuḻikkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ālaka
laiyuḷpaṭṭa puṉcey nilam 10 li Innilam patiṟṟu veliyum Āka natta nilam Oru veliyum nañcey nilam Iru ve
patimuveliyum Iṟaiilikāṇiyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa Emmi(l)licainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu
tiṉ kaḻaiñcum pa
Aviṣekattukku Oṭukku koṇṭu Iṉṉi
m Āti caṇṭeśvaratevar Aruḷāl I
Digital edition of SII 38.503 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
